description: Added useInfiniteScroll hook that fires on every scroll event
diff_summary: Added useInfiniteScroll hook that calls onLoadMore when user scrolls near bottom

edge_cases: onLoadMore fires repeatedly on every scroll event when near bottom — floods API with requests; no loading state guard or debounce
ground_truth.broken_pattern: No throttle/debounce on scroll handler — fires at 60fps; no isLoading check to prevent concurrent load-more calls; threshold check is one-shot but re-fires continuously
ground_truth.next_prompt: Infinite scroll is making hundreds of API requests when I scroll to the bottom
ground_truth.notes: Scroll handler without throttle is a classic performance/correctness bug
